and":{"book_id":"7114642482326932513","book_info":{"abstract":"[历史架空+休闲搞笑+老六！]
身为皇子，我有块封地不过分吧？
自己的封地我自己说了算，为非作歹也合理吧？
抵达封地的第一天，逛青楼。
第二天逛赌坊，在赌场输钱了？绝对不可能，这不都是我的钱么？
敲诈富商收保护费都是常事。
乞丐沿街要饭？我给你们找个工作，全都挖水渠去！
李安在封地为非作歹，可劲霍霍。
却让封地经济非一般的提升，打造一支王者之师，横扫天下。
平南方诸国叛乱，杀匈奴，荡倭寇，万国来朝。
我乃大华第一逍遥王，李安！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/81b936fb6031ad3e83e2280ee4152838","author":"乏了","author_id":"","book_id":"7114642482326932513","book_name":"开局发配边疆，我在封地为非作歹","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7114660197096522254","read_count":"34621","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1109798"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"501","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dc821ce6fae1c3d5de15ef2dccb31cd8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779469208&x-signature=eBy1jDX75JeT9NXsTu0ZxuwnY6w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"132389473354935","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.292275e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324010008D3A21E5850CC6874868E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":39,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":13,"show_pv":83286},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_
